mnemonics.title: SELECT Clause Order
mnemonics.content: S-F-W-G-H-O: Select From Where Group Having Order - the sequence to write SQL queries

mnemonics.title: WHERE vs HAVING
mnemonics.content: W-G-H: Where Groups (filters first), Having (filters after) - remember WHERE comes before GROUP BY, HAVING after

mnemonics.title: Join Types
mnemonics.content: INNER: Only matches | LEFT: All left + matches | RIGHT: All right + matches | FULL: All from both

acronyms.usage: Standard language for relational database management systems
SELECT DISTINCT removes duplicate rows from results

visualTips.visualization: Draw a flow: FROM → WHERE → GROUP BY → HAVING → SELECT → ORDER BY. WHERE filters rows BEFORE grouping, HAVING filters AFTER grouping.
INNER = overlap only | LEFT = left circle + overlap | RIGHT = right circle + overlap | FULL = both circles combined

analogies.analogy: Like a shopping list: you specify exactly what items (columns) you want from the store (table)
Like a filter on a coffee machine: only liquid that meets criteria passes through
Like organizing receipts by category before calculating totals for each category
